description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a combination of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The structure is surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with various trees, shrubs, and a manicured lawn. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway leading from a large driveway, and the property includes a private backyard with outdoor seating and decorative plants. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light. The building appears to be single-story, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces, and a garage or carport is attached to one side. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood and concrete finishes, large windows, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden fence, landscaped yard, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped terrain, garage/carport, and additional greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Driveway view displaying the main entrance walkway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping at the front.
description_view_3: Rear/side view revealing the backyard, outdoor seating, and privacy fencing with grouped trees and shrubs.
